title: Cookie Policy
s1_p1: Cookies are small text files that a website stores on your device when you visit it. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to site owners.
s2_p1: Sweevil (sweevil.pt) uses strictly necessary cookies required for the platform to function, and optional analytics and marketing cookies that are only activated with your consent.
s2_1_p1: These cookies cannot be disabled. They do not require your consent under Law No. 41/2004.
s2_2_p1: Set only when you accept analytics cookies in the cookie banner.
s2_2_row2_purpose: Persists session state for GA4 property
s2_3_p1: Set only when you accept marketing cookies in the cookie banner.
s2_3_row1_purpose: Identifies browsers for ad delivery and attribution
s2_3_row2_purpose: Stores last click attribution from Facebook ads
s3_p1: This site uses browser local storage for strictly necessary functionality. These are not cookies and do not require consent:
s3_li2_desc: Saves items in your shopping cart between visits.
s3_li3_desc: Remembers your shipping address during checkout.
s4_p1: Strictly necessary cookies do not require consent pursuant to Law No. 41/2004 and the ePrivacy Directive 2002/58/EC. Analytics and marketing cookies are processed based on your freely given consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)), which you may withdraw at any time by clicking Reject All in the cookie banner.
s5_p1: You may also configure your browser to block or delete cookies:
s6_p1: For questions related to this policy, contact us at
